title: Sweetzone Twin Cherries Sweet Tub, 100 Pcs, 800, Halal Sweets, Sour Sweets, Gummy Candy, Jelly Candy, and Gummy Candy in Fun Tubs of Sweet, Fruit Flavour Gums for Everyone
features: 🍒🍭 Cherry Bliss Power: Immerse yourself in the taste of Cherries with Sweetzone Twin Cherries. These delectable sweets offer a symphony of fruity cherry flavors, creating a pick and mix experience that turns every tub of sweets into a personalized delight.

🏝️🍒 Cherry Delight in Every Bite: Experience a tropical getaway with each chew of Sweetzone Twin Cherries in 800 g of exquisite 100 pcs twins. These pick and mix sweets bring you a fusion of exotic flavors, expertly combined to create a tub of sweets that transports you to a paradise of taste.

🍬🎉 Cherry Candy Reimagined: Welcome the extraordinary with Sweetzone Twin Cherries. This tub of sweets redefines satisfying sour candy, offering a perfect balance of tangy and sweet that will leave your taste buds dancing.

🌱 Quality Ingredients: Savor with confidence, for each delightful bite within this sweet tubs is carefully crafted with Halal-endorsed ingredients: Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Apple Juice From Concentrate, Flavourings, Colours (E100(ii), E141, E163, E133).

☪️ Halal Goodness: Embrace the pleasure of indulging in halal sweets snacks that align with your preferences and beliefs. With Sweetzone Twin Cherries, you can enjoy a delectable, guiltless sweetness that respects your choices.
